pageSize.description: Maximum number of items to return per page. Server may return fewer items. Default is 20, maximum is 100.

pageToken.description: Opaque token for fetching the next page of results. Obtained from PageResponse.next_page_token of a previous request. Omit for the first page.

nextPageToken.description: Token to retrieve the next page of results. Empty if there are no more results.

totalCount.description: Total number of items across all pages (if known). May be omitted if the total is expensive to compute.
